They serve the St. Paul and Twin Cities metro area with expert antique valuations.

content.about: ValuePros Appraisal Services is a family-owned appraisal firm operating since 1976. They serve the St. Paul, MN area with USPAP-compliant appraisal reports for antiques, collectibles, fine art, and personal property. As independent accredited appraisers, they provide unbiased valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and legal matters.
content.notes: Family owned since 1976. Independent appraisers serving St. Paul MN and Twin Cities.
